mdRecord.dcterms:title: Family Correspondence and Personal Letter from C. M. Stigleman on the Birth of his Daughter
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Family correspondence, personal letter dated July 14, 1861 to “My Dear Wife,” sent from “At Bradleys on Picket,” from C. M. Stigleman. Main subject the birth of their 2nd child and 1st daughter – born 3 o’clock July 12, 1801. 1 original piece, 2 page photocopies, 1 page typed transcription.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Records and correspondence
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
